dataType.title: Data Type
dataType.description: Which data to fetch from MAVIR

interval.title: Data Interval
interval.description: How often to collect data (for scheduled runs)

priceThreshold.title: Price Alert Threshold (HUF/MWh)
priceThreshold.description: Send alert when electricity price exceeds this threshold. Leave empty to disable.

enableNotifications.title: Enable Notifications
enableNotifications.description: Send webhook notifications when price threshold is exceeded

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: URL to send notifications (Discord, Slack, custom endpoint)
